modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Error message when uploading files in Attachment Manager

full_description_text: Users are encountering an "Upload Failed" error when attempting to upload documents through the Attachment Manager. The feature is not functioning as expected, and the attachments are not loading properly. This issue persists across multiple attempts.
short_description: Error message when uploading files in Attachment Manager
description: Users are encountering an "Upload Failed" error when attempting to upload documents through the Attachment Manager. The feature is not functioning as expected, and the attachments are not loading properly. This issue persists across multiple attempts.
